scripts.kid:verify: npm -w @tiny-bubbles/kid run typecheck && npm -w @tiny-bubbles/kid test && npm -w @tiny-bubbles/kid run export:web
scripts.parent:verify: npm -w @tiny-bubbles/parent run typecheck && npm -w @tiny-bubbles/parent test && npm -w @tiny-bubbles/parent run export:web
scripts.fns:verify: npm --prefix functions run build && npm --prefix functions test
scripts.verify:all: npm run shared:verify && npm run kid:verify && npm run parent:verify && npm run fns:verify
scripts.gates: npm run gate:evidence-honesty && npm run gate:symbol-license && npm run gate:anti-shame && npm run gate:provenance
